    generate    Generate code from a font and liquid template

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    Fontier code [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    generate    Generate code from a font and liquid template
    preview     Preview code from a font and liquid template

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Generate code from a font and liquid template

USAGE:
    Fontier code generate [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                        Prints help information                   
    -f, --font <FONT_PATH>            The font path                             
    -t, --template <TEMPLATE_PATH>    The path to the liquid template file      
    -o, --output <VALUE>              Output path and filename for the generated
                                      code                                      
        --transform <CASE>            The case wanted for the glyphs in the     
                                      output. Valid values: [ camel | pascal |  
                                      kebab | snake ]
